# Autofill - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode  

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

Autofill[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#autofill "Link to this heading")

======================================================================================================================

Defines commands and events for Autofill.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#types "Link to this heading")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ CreditCard(_number_, _name_, _expiry\_month_, _expiry\_year_, _cvc_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#CreditCard)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard "Link to this definition")

number_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard.number "Link to this definition")

16-digit credit card number.

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard.name "Link to this definition")

Name of the credit card owner.

expiry\_month_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard.expiry_month "Link to this definition")

2-digit expiry month.

expiry\_year_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard.expiry_year "Link to this definition")

4-digit expiry year.

cvc_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard.cvc "Link to this definition")

3-digit card verification code.

_class_ AddressField(_name_, _value_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#AddressField)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField "Link to this definition")

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField.name "Link to this definition")

address field name, for example GIVEN\_NAME. The full list of supported field names: [https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/autofill/core/browser/field\_types.cc;l=38](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:components/autofill/core/browser/field_types.cc;l=38)

value_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField.value "Link to this definition")

address field value, for example Jon Doe.

_class_ AddressFields(_fields_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#AddressFields)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFields "Link to this definition")

A list of address fields.

fields_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AddressField`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField "nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFields.fields "Link to this definition")

_class_ Address(_fields_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#Address)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.Address "Link to this definition")

fields_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AddressField`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField "nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressField")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.Address.fields "Link to this definition")

fields and values defining an address.

_class_ AddressUI(_address\_fields_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#AddressUI)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressUI "Link to this definition")

Defines how an address can be displayed like in chrome://settings/addresses. Address UI is a two dimensional array, each inner array is an “address information line”, and when rendered in a UI surface should be displayed as such. The following address UI for instance: \[\[{name: “GIVE\_NAME”, value: “Jon”}, {name: “FAMILY\_NAME”, value: “Doe”}\], \[{name: “CITY”, value: “Munich”}, {name: “ZIP”, value: “81456”}\]\] should allow the receiver to render: Jon Doe Munich 81456

address\_fields_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AddressFields`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFields "nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFields")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressUI.address_fields "Link to this definition")

A two dimension array containing the representation of values from an address profile.

_class_ FillingStrategy(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#FillingStrategy)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FillingStrategy "Link to this definition")

Specified whether a filled field was done so by using the html autocomplete attribute or autofill heuristics.

AUTOCOMPLETE\_ATTRIBUTE _\= 'autocompleteAttribute'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FillingStrategy.AUTOCOMPLETE_ATTRIBUTE "Link to this definition")

AUTOFILL\_INFERRED _\= 'autofillInferred'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FillingStrategy.AUTOFILL_INFERRED "Link to this definition")

The actual field type, e.g FAMILY\_NAME

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FilledField.filling_strategy "Link to this definition")

The filling strategy

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FilledField.frame_id "Link to this definition")

The frame the field belongs to

field\_id_: [`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FilledField.field_id "Link to this definition")

The form field’s DOM node

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#commands "Link to this heading")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

trigger(_field\_id_, _frame\_id\=None_, _card\=None_, _address\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#trigger)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.trigger "Link to this definition")

Trigger autofill on a form identified by the fieldId. If the field and related form cannot be autofilled, returns an error.

Parameters:

*   **field\_id** ([`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")
    ) – Identifies a field that serves as an anchor for autofill.
    
*   **frame\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifies the frame that field belongs to.
    
*   **card** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`CreditCard`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard "nodriver.cdp.autofill.CreditCard")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Credit card information to fill out the form. Credit card data is not saved. Mutually exclusive with ``` `address`` ```.
    
*   **address** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`Address`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.Address "nodriver.cdp.autofill.Address")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Address to fill out the form. Address data is not saved. Mutually exclusive with ``` ``card` ```.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#events "Link to this heading")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ AddressFormFilled(_filled\_fields_, _address\_ui_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#AddressFormFilled)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFormFilled "Link to this definition")

Emitted when an address form is filled.

filled\_fields_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`FilledField`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.FilledField "nodriver.cdp.autofill.FilledField")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFormFilled.filled_fields "Link to this definition")

Information about the fields that were filled

address\_ui_: [`AddressUI`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressUI "nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressUI")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/autofill.html#nodriver.cdp.autofill.AddressFormFilled.address_ui "Link to this definition")

An UI representation of the address used to fill the form. Consists of a 2D array where each child represents an address/profile line.

Animation[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#animation "Link to this heading")

=========================================================================================================================

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#types "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ Animation(_id\__, _name_, _paused\_state_, _play\_state_, _playback\_rate_, _start\_time_, _current\_time_, _type\__, _source\=None_, _css\_id\=None_, _view\_or\_scroll\_timeline\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#Animation)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation "Link to this definition")

Animation instance.

id\__: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")

`Animation`’s id.

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.name "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s name.

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.paused_state "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s internal paused state.

play\_state_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.play_state "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s play state.

playback\_rate_: [`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.playback_rate "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s playback rate.

start\_time_: [`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.start_time "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s start time. Milliseconds for time based animations and percentage \[0 - 100\] for scroll driven animations (i.e. when viewOrScrollTimeline exists).

current\_time_: [`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.current_time "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s current time.

type\__: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.type_ "Link to this definition")

Animation type of `Animation`.

source_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AnimationEffect`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.AnimationEffect "nodriver.cdp.animation.AnimationEffect")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.source "Link to this definition")

`Animation`’s source animation node.

css\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.css_id "Link to this definition")

A unique ID for `Animation` representing the sources that triggered this CSS animation/transition.

view\_or\_scroll\_timeline_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`ViewOrScrollTimeline`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline "nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.Animation.view_or_scroll_timeline "Link to this definition")

View or scroll timeline

_class_ ViewOrScrollTimeline(_axis_, _source\_node\_id\=None_, _start\_offset\=None_, _end\_offset\=None_, _subject\_node\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#ViewOrScrollTimeline)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline "Link to this definition")

Timeline instance

axis_: [`ScrollOrientation`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.ScrollOrientation "nodriver.cdp.dom.ScrollOrientation")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline.axis "Link to this definition")

Orientation of the scroll

source\_node\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline.source_node_id "Link to this definition")

Scroll container node

start\_offset_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline.start_offset "Link to this definition")

Represents the starting scroll position of the timeline as a length offset in pixels from scroll origin.

end\_offset_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline.end_offset "Link to this definition")

Represents the ending scroll position of the timeline as a length offset in pixels from scroll origin.

subject\_node\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#nodriver.cdp.animation.ViewOrScrollTimeline.subject_node_id "Link to this definition")

The element whose principal box’s visibility in the scrollport defined the progress of the timeline. Does not exist for animations with ScrollTimeline

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#commands "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/animation.html#events "Link to this heading")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

# BackgroundService - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode  

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

BackgroundService[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#backgroundservice "Link to this heading")

==================================================================================================================================================

Defines events for background web platform features.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#types "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ ServiceName(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#ServiceName)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName "Link to this definition")

The Background Service that will be associated with the commands/events. Every Background Service operates independently, but they share the same API.

BACKGROUND\_FETCH _\= 'backgroundFetch'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.BACKGROUND_FETCH "Link to this definition")

BACKGROUND\_SYNC _\= 'backgroundSync'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.BACKGROUND_SYNC "Link to this definition")

PUSH\_MESSAGING _\= 'pushMessaging'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.PUSH_MESSAGING "Link to this definition")

NOTIFICATIONS _\= 'notifications'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.NOTIFICATIONS "Link to this definition")

PAYMENT\_HANDLER _\= 'paymentHandler'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.PAYMENT_HANDLER "Link to this definition")

PERIODIC\_BACKGROUND\_SYNC _\= 'periodicBackgroundSync'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName.PERIODIC_BACKGROUND_SYNC "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.EventMetadata "Link to this definition")

A key-value pair for additional event information to pass along.

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.EventMetadata.key "Link to this definition")

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.EventMetadata.value "Link to this definition")

_class_ BackgroundServiceEvent(_timestamp_, _origin_, _service\_worker\_registration\_id_, _service_, _event\_name_, _instance\_id_, _event\_metadata_, _storage\_key_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#BackgroundServiceEvent)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent "Link to this definition")

timestamp_: [`TimeSinceEpoch`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.TimeSinceEpoch "nodriver.cdp.network.TimeSinceEpoch")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.timestamp "Link to this definition")

Timestamp of the event (in seconds).

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.origin "Link to this definition")

The origin this event belongs to.

service\_worker\_registration\_id_: [`RegistrationID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/service_worker.html#nodriver.cdp.service_worker.RegistrationID "nodriver.cdp.service_worker.RegistrationID")

The Service Worker ID that initiated the event.

service_: [`ServiceName`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName "nodriver.cdp.background_service.ServiceName")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.service "Link to this definition")

The Background Service this event belongs to.

event\_name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.event_name "Link to this definition")

A description of the event.

instance\_id_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.instance_id "Link to this definition")

An identifier that groups related events together.

event\_metadata_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`EventMetadata`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.EventMetadata "nodriver.cdp.background_service.EventMetadata")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.event_metadata "Link to this definition")

A list of event-specific information.

storage\_key_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#nodriver.cdp.background_service.BackgroundServiceEvent.storage_key "Link to this definition")

Storage key this event belongs to.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/background_service.html#commands "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

Console[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#console "Link to this heading")

===================================================================================================================

This domain is deprecated - use Runtime or Log instead.

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#types "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ ConsoleMessage(_source_, _level_, _text_, _url\=None_, _line\=None_, _column\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/console.html#ConsoleMessage)

Console message.

source_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")

Message source.

level_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#nodriver.cdp.console.ConsoleMessage.level "Link to this definition")

Message severity.

Message text.

url_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#nodriver.cdp.console.ConsoleMessage.url "Link to this definition")

URL of the message origin.

line_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#nodriver.cdp.console.ConsoleMessage.line "Link to this definition")

Line number in the resource that generated this message (1-based).

column_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#nodriver.cdp.console.ConsoleMessage.column "Link to this definition")

Column number in the resource that generated this message (1-based).

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/console.html#commands "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cache_storage.html#commands "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

request\_entries(_cache\_id_, _skip\_count\=None_, _page\_size\=None_, _path\_filter\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/cache_storage.html#request_entries)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cache_storage.html#nodriver.cdp.cache_storage.request_entries "Link to this definition")

Requests data from cache.

Parameters:

*   **cache\_id** ([`CacheId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cache_storage.html#nodriver.cdp.cache_storage.CacheId "nodriver.cdp.cache_storage.CacheId")
    ) – ID of cache to get entries from.
    
*   **skip\_count** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Number of records to skip.
    
*   **page\_size** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Number of records to fetch.
    
*   **path\_filter** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ If present, only return the entries containing this substring in the path
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Tuple`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Tuple "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`DataEntry`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cache_storage.html#nodriver.cdp.cache_storage.DataEntry "nodriver.cdp.cache_storage.DataEntry")\
\], [`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **cacheDataEntries** - Array of object store data entries.
    
1.  **returnCount** - Count of returned entries from this storage. If pathFilter is empty, it is the count of all entries from this storage.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_There are no events in this module._

# Cast - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

Cast[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#cast "Link to this heading")

==========================================================================================================

A domain for interacting with Cast, Presentation API, and Remote Playback API functionalities.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#types "Link to this heading")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ Sink(_name_, _id\__, _session\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#Sink)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink "Link to this definition")

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink.name "Link to this definition")

id\__: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink.id_ "Link to this definition")

session_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink.session "Link to this definition")

Text describing the current session. Present only if there is an active session on the sink.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#commands "Link to this heading")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.disable "Link to this definition")

Stops observing for sinks and issues.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")

enable(_presentation\_url\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#enable)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.enable "Link to this definition")

Starts observing for sinks that can be used for tab mirroring, and if set, sinks compatible with `presentationUrl` as well. When sinks are found, a `sinksUpdated` event is fired. Also starts observing for issue messages. When an issue is added or removed, an `issueUpdated` event is fired.

Parameters:

**presentation\_url** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]) – _(Optional)_

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

Stops the active Cast session on the sink.

Parameters:

**sink\_name** ([`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
) –

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#events "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ SinksUpdated(_sinks_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#SinksUpdated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.SinksUpdated "Link to this definition")

This is fired whenever the list of available sinks changes. A sink is a device or a software surface that you can cast to.

sinks_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Sink`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink "nodriver.cdp.cast.Sink")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.SinksUpdated.sinks "Link to this definition")

_class_ IssueUpdated(_issue\_message_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#IssueUpdated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.IssueUpdated "Link to this definition")

This is fired whenever the outstanding issue/error message changes. `issueMessage` is empty if there is no issue.

issue\_message_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/cast.html#nodriver.cdp.cast.IssueUpdated.issue_message "Link to this definition")

---

# DeviceOrientation - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode  

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

DeviceOrientation[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#deviceorientation "Link to this heading")

==================================================================================================================================================

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#types "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_There are no types in this module._

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_orientation.html#commands "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

Accessibility[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#accessibility "Link to this heading")

=====================================================================================================================================

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#types "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ AXNodeId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#AXNodeId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId "Link to this definition")

Unique accessibility node identifier.

_class_ AXPropertyName(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#AXPropertyName)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXPropertyName "Link to this definition")

Values of AXProperty name: - from ‘busy’ to ‘roledescription’: states which apply to every AX node - from ‘live’ to ‘root’: attributes which apply to nodes in live regions - from ‘autocomplete’ to ‘valuetext’: attributes which apply to widgets - from ‘checked’ to ‘selected’: states which apply to widgets - from ‘activedescendant’ to ‘owns’ - relationships between elements other than parent/child/sibling.

_class_ AXNode(_node\_id_, _ignored_, _ignored\_reasons\=None_, _role\=None_, _chrome\_role\=None_, _name\=None_, _description\=None_, _value\=None_, _properties\=None_, _parent\_id\=None_, _child\_ids\=None_, _backend\_dom\_node\_id\=None_, _frame\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#AXNode)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "Link to this definition")

A node in the accessibility tree.

node\_id_: [`AXNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.node_id "Link to this definition")

Unique identifier for this node.

ignored_: [`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.ignored "Link to this definition")

Whether this node is ignored for accessibility

ignored\_reasons_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXProperty`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXProperty "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXProperty")\
\]\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.ignored_reasons "Link to this definition")

Collection of reasons why this node is hidden.

role_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXValue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.role "Link to this definition")

This `Node`’s role, whether explicit or implicit.

chrome\_role_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXValue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.chrome_role "Link to this definition")

This `Node`’s Chrome raw role.

name_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXValue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.name "Link to this definition")

The accessible name for this `Node`.

description_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXValue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.description "Link to this definition")

The accessible description for this `Node`.

value_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXValue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXValue")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.value "Link to this definition")

The value for this `Node`.

properties_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXProperty`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXProperty "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXProperty")\
\]\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.properties "Link to this definition")

All other properties

parent\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.parent_id "Link to this definition")

ID for this node’s parent.

child\_ids_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNodeId")\
\]\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.child_ids "Link to this definition")

IDs for each of this node’s child nodes.

backend\_dom\_node\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.backend_dom_node_id "Link to this definition")

The backend ID for the associated DOM node, if any.

frame\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode.frame_id "Link to this definition")

The frame ID for the frame associated with this nodes document.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#commands "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

disable()[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#disable)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.disable "Link to this definition")

Disables the accessibility domain.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

enable()[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#enable)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.enable "Link to this definition")

Enables the accessibility domain which causes `AXNodeId`’s to remain consistent between method calls. This turns on accessibility for the page, which can impact performance until accessibility is disabled.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

get\_ax\_node\_and\_ancestors(_node\_id\=None_, _backend\_node\_id\=None_, _object\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#get_ax_node_and_ancestors)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.get_ax_node_and_ancestors "Link to this definition")

Fetches a node and all ancestors up to and including the root. Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the node to get.
    
*   **backend\_node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the backend node to get.
    
*   **object\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`RemoteObjectId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/runtime.html#nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId "nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")\
\]\]

Returns:

get\_child\_ax\_nodes(_id\__, _frame\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#get_child_ax_nodes)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.get_child_ax_nodes "Link to this definition")

Fetches a particular accessibility node by AXNodeId. Requires `enable()` to have been called previously.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **id** –
    
*   **frame\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ The frame in whose document the node resides. If omitted, the root frame is used.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")

get\_full\_ax\_tree(_depth\=None_, _frame\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#get_full_ax_tree)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.get_full_ax_tree "Link to this definition")

Fetches the entire accessibility tree for the root Document

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **depth** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ The maximum depth at which descendants of the root node should be retrieved. If omitted, the full tree is returned.
    
*   **frame\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ The frame for whose document the AX tree should be retrieved. If omitted, the root frame is used.

get\_partial\_ax\_tree(_node\_id\=None_, _backend\_node\_id\=None_, _object\_id\=None_, _fetch\_relatives\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#get_partial_ax_tree)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.get_partial_ax_tree "Link to this definition")

Fetches the accessibility node and partial accessibility tree for this DOM node, if it exists.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the node to get the partial accessibility tree for.
    
*   **backend\_node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the backend node to get the partial accessibility tree for.
    
*   **object\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`RemoteObjectId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/runtime.html#nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId "nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ JavaScript object id of the node wrapper to get the partial accessibility tree for.
    
*   **fetch\_relatives** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to fetch this node’s ancestors, siblings and children. Defaults to true.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")\
\]\]

Returns:

The `Accessibility.AXNode` for this DOM node, if it exists, plus its ancestors, siblings and children, if requested.

\[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
\]) – _(Optional)_ The frame in whose document the node resides. If omitted, the root frame is used.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")\
\]

Returns:

query\_ax\_tree(_node\_id\=None_, _backend\_node\_id\=None_, _object\_id\=None_, _accessible\_name\=None_, _role\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#query_ax_tree)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.query_ax_tree "Link to this definition")

Query a DOM node’s accessibility subtree for accessible name and role. This command computes the name and role for all nodes in the subtree, including those that are ignored for accessibility, and returns those that match the specified name and role. If no DOM node is specified, or the DOM node does not exist, the command returns an error. If neither `accessibleName` or `role` is specified, it returns all the accessibility nodes in the subtree.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the node for the root to query.
    
*   **backend\_node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Identifier of the backend node for the root to query.
    
*   **object\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`RemoteObjectId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/runtime.html#nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId "nodriver.cdp.runtime.RemoteObjectId")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ JavaScript object id of the node wrapper for the root to query.
    
*   **accessible\_name** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Find nodes with this computed name.
    
*   **role** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Find nodes with this computed role.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")\
\]\]

Returns:

A list of `Accessibility.AXNode` matching the specified attributes, including nodes that are ignored for accessibility.

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#events "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ LoadComplete(_root_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#LoadComplete)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.LoadComplete "Link to this definition")

**EXPERIMENTAL**

The loadComplete event mirrors the load complete event sent by the browser to assistive technology when the web page has finished loading.

root_: [`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.LoadComplete.root "Link to this definition")

New document root node.

_class_ NodesUpdated(_nodes_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#NodesUpdated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.NodesUpdated "Link to this definition")

**EXPERIMENTAL**

The nodesUpdated event is sent every time a previously requested node has changed the in tree.

nodes_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AXNode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode "nodriver.cdp.accessibility.AXNode")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/accessibility.html#nodriver.cdp.accessibility.NodesUpdated.nodes "Link to this definition")

Updated node data.

# DeviceAccess - nodriver documentation

DeviceAccess[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#deviceaccess "Link to this heading")

===================================================================================================================================

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#types "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ RequestId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#RequestId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.RequestId "Link to this definition")

Device request id.

_class_ DeviceId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#DeviceId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.DeviceId "Link to this definition")

A device id.

_class_ PromptDevice(_id\__, _name_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#PromptDevice)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.PromptDevice "Link to this definition")

Device information displayed in a user prompt to select a device.

id\__: [`DeviceId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.DeviceId "nodriver.cdp.device_access.DeviceId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.PromptDevice.id_ "Link to this definition")

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#nodriver.cdp.device_access.PromptDevice.name "Link to this definition")

Display name as it appears in a device request user prompt.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/device_access.html#commands "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

BluetoothEmulation[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/bluetooth_emulation.html#bluetoothemulation "Link to this heading")

=====================================================================================================================================================

This domain allows configuring virtual Bluetooth devices to test the web-bluetooth API.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/bluetooth_emulation.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/bluetooth_emulation.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/bluetooth_emulation.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/bluetooth_emulation.html#types "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.
