Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_audio.html#events "Link to this heading")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

# Target - nodriver documentation

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

Target[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#target "Link to this heading")

================================================================================================================

Supports additional targets discovery and allows to attach to them.

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#types "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ TargetID[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetID)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "Link to this definition")

_class_ SessionID[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#SessionID)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID "Link to this definition")

Unique identifier of attached debugging session.

https

\[[`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")\

\[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\

Frame id of originating window (is only set if target has an opener).

parent\_frame\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo.parent_frame_id "Link to this definition")

Id of the parent frame, only present for the “iframe” targets.

browser\_context\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BrowserContextID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/browser.html#nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID "nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo.browser_context_id "Link to this definition")

subtype_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo.subtype "Link to this definition")

Provides additional details for specific target types. For example, for the type of “page”, this may be set to “prerender”.

_class_ FilterEntry(_exclude\=None_, _type\_\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#FilterEntry)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.FilterEntry "Link to this definition")

A filter used by target query/discovery/auto-attach operations.

exclude_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.FilterEntry.exclude "Link to this definition")

If set, causes exclusion of matching targets from the list.

type\__: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.FilterEntry.type_ "Link to this definition")

If not present, matches any type.

_class_ TargetFilter(_iterable\=()_, _/_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetFilter)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetFilter "Link to this definition")

The entries in TargetFilter are matched sequentially against targets and the first entry that matches determines if the target is included or not, depending on the value of `exclude` field in the entry. If filter is not specified, the one assumed is \[{type: “browser”, exclude: true}, {type: “tab”, exclude: true}, {}\] (i.e. include everything but `browser` and `tab`).

The state of the target window.

NORMAL _\= 'normal'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState.NORMAL "Link to this definition")

MINIMIZED _\= 'minimized'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState.MINIMIZED "Link to this definition")

MAXIMIZED _\= 'maximized'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState.MAXIMIZED "Link to this definition")

FULLSCREEN _\= 'fullscreen'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState.FULLSCREEN "Link to this definition")

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#commands "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

auto\_attach\_related(_target\_id_, _wait\_for\_debugger\_on\_start_, _filter\_\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#auto_attach_related)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.auto_attach_related "Link to this definition")

Adds the specified target to the list of targets that will be monitored for any related target creation (such as child frames, child workers and new versions of service worker) and reported through `attachedToTarget`. The specified target is also auto-attached. This cancels the effect of any previous `setAutoAttach` and is also cancelled by subsequent `setAutoAttach`. Only available at the Browser target.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **target\_id** ([`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")
    ) –
    
*   **wait\_for\_debugger\_on\_start** ([`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) – Whether to pause new targets when attaching to them. Use `` `Runtime.runIfWaitingForDebugger` `` to run paused targets.
    
*   **filter** – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Only targets matching filter will be attached.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.close_target "Link to this definition")

\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\

\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\

\]

Always set to true. If an error occurs, the response indicates protocol error.

create\_browser\_context(_dispose\_on\_detach\=None_, _proxy\_server\=None_, _proxy\_bypass\_list\=None_, _origins\_with\_universal\_network\_access\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#create_browser_context)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.create_browser_context "Link to this definition")

Creates a new empty BrowserContext. Similar to an incognito profile but you can have more than one.

Parameters:

*   **dispose\_on\_detach** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ If specified, disposes this context when debugging session disconnects.
    
*   **proxy\_server** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Proxy server, similar to the one passed to –proxy-server
    
*   **proxy\_bypass\_list** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Proxy bypass list, similar to the one passed to –proxy-bypass-list
    
*   **origins\_with\_universal\_network\_access** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]\]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ An optional list of origins to grant unlimited cross-origin access to. Parts of the URL other than those constituting origin are ignored.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`BrowserContextID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/browser.html#nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID "nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID")\
\]

Returns:

The id of the context created.

create\_target(_url_, _left\=None_, _top\=None_, _width\=None_, _height\=None_, _window\_state\=None_, _browser\_context\_id\=None_, _enable\_begin\_frame\_control\=None_, _new\_window\=None_, _background\=None_, _for\_tab\=None_, _hidden\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#create_target)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.create_target "Link to this definition")

Creates a new page.

Parameters:

*   **url** ([`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) – The initial URL the page will be navigated to. An empty string indicates [about:blank](about:blank)
    .
    
*   **left** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Frame left origin in DIP (requires newWindow to be true or headless shell).
    
*   **top** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Frame top origin in DIP (requires newWindow to be true or headless shell).
    
*   **width** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Frame width in DIP (requires newWindow to be true or headless shell).
    
*   **height** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Frame height in DIP (requires newWindow to be true or headless shell).
    
*   **window\_state** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`WindowState`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState "nodriver.cdp.target.WindowState")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Frame window state (requires newWindow to be true or headless shell). Default is normal.
    
*   **browser\_context\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`BrowserContextID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/browser.html#nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID "nodriver.cdp.browser.BrowserContextID")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ The browser context to create the page in.
    
*   **enable\_begin\_frame\_control** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Whether BeginFrames for this target will be controlled via DevTools (headless shell only, not supported on MacOS yet, false by default).
    
*   **new\_window** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to create a new Window or Tab (false by default, not supported by headless shell).
    
*   **background** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to create the target in background or foreground (false by default, not supported by headless shell).
    
*   **for\_tab** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Whether to create the target of type “tab”.
    
*   **hidden** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Whether to create a hidden target. The hidden target is observable via protocol, but not present in the tab UI strip. Cannot be created with ``` `forTab: true`` ```, ` ``newWindow: true`` ` or ``` ``background: false` ```. The life-time of the tab is limited to the life-time of the session.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")\
\]

Returns:

The id of the page opened.

expose\_dev\_tools\_protocol(_target\_id_, _binding\_name\=None_, _inherit\_permissions\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#expose_dev_tools_protocol)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.expose_dev_tools_protocol "Link to this definition")

Inject object to the target’s main frame that provides a communication channel with browser target.

Injected object will be available as `window[bindingName]`.

The object has the following API: - `binding.send(json)` - a method to send messages over the remote debugging protocol - `binding.onmessage = json => handleMessage(json)` - a callback that will be called for the protocol notifications and command responses.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **target\_id** ([`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")
    ) –
    
*   **binding\_name** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Binding name, ‘cdp’ if not specified.
    
*   **inherit\_permissions** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ If true, inherits the current root session’s permissions (default: false).
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

set\_auto\_attach(_auto\_attach_, _wait\_for\_debugger\_on\_start_, _flatten\=None_, _filter\_\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#set_auto_attach)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.set_auto_attach "Link to this definition")

Controls whether to automatically attach to new targets which are considered to be directly related to this one (for example, iframes or workers). When turned on, attaches to all existing related targets as well. When turned off, automatically detaches from all currently attached targets. This also clears all targets added by `autoAttachRelated` from the list of targets to watch for creation of related targets. You might want to call this recursively for auto-attached targets to attach to all available targets.

Parameters:

*   **auto\_attach** ([`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) – Whether to auto-attach to related targets.
    
*   **wait\_for\_debugger\_on\_start** ([`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) – Whether to pause new targets when attaching to them. Use `` `Runtime.runIfWaitingForDebugger` `` to run paused targets.
    
*   **flatten** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Enables “flat” access to the session via specifying sessionId attribute in the commands. We plan to make this the default, deprecate non-flattened mode, and eventually retire it. See crbug.com/991325.
    
*   **filter** – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ Only targets matching filter will be attached.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")

\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#events "Link to this heading")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ AttachedToTarget(_session\_id_, _target\_info_, _waiting\_for\_debugger_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#AttachedToTarget)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.AttachedToTarget "Link to this definition")

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Issued when attached to target because of auto-attach or `attachToTarget` command.

session\_id_: [`SessionID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID "nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.AttachedToTarget.session_id "Link to this definition")

Identifier assigned to the session used to send/receive messages.

target\_info_: [`TargetInfo`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.AttachedToTarget.target_info "Link to this definition")

waiting\_for\_debugger_: [`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.AttachedToTarget.waiting_for_debugger "Link to this definition")

_class_ DetachedFromTarget(_session\_id_, _target\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#DetachedFromTarget)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.DetachedFromTarget "Link to this definition")

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Issued when detached from target for any reason (including `detachFromTarget` command). Can be issued multiple times per target if multiple sessions have been attached to it.

session\_id_: [`SessionID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID "nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.DetachedFromTarget.session_id "Link to this definition")

Detached session identifier.

target\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.DetachedFromTarget.target_id "Link to this definition")

Deprecated.

_class_ ReceivedMessageFromTarget(_session\_id_, _message_, _target\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#ReceivedMessageFromTarget)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.ReceivedMessageFromTarget "Link to this definition")

Notifies about a new protocol message received from the session (as reported in `attachedToTarget` event).

session\_id_: [`SessionID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID "nodriver.cdp.target.SessionID")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.ReceivedMessageFromTarget.session_id "Link to this definition")

Identifier of a session which sends a message.

message_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.ReceivedMessageFromTarget.message "Link to this definition")

target\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.ReceivedMessageFromTarget.target_id "Link to this definition")

Deprecated.

_class_ TargetCreated(_target\_info_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetCreated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCreated "Link to this definition")

Issued when a possible inspection target is created.

target\_info_: [`TargetInfo`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCreated.target_info "Link to this definition")

_class_ TargetDestroyed(_target\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetDestroyed)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetDestroyed "Link to this definition")

Issued when a target is destroyed.

target\_id_: [`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetDestroyed.target_id "Link to this definition")

_class_ TargetCrashed(_target\_id_, _status_, _error\_code_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetCrashed)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCrashed "Link to this definition")

Issued when a target has crashed.

target\_id_: [`TargetID`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetID")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCrashed.target_id "Link to this definition")

status_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCrashed.status "Link to this definition")

Termination status type.

error\_code_: [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetCrashed.error_code "Link to this definition")

Termination error code.

_class_ TargetInfoChanged(_target\_info_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/target.html#TargetInfoChanged)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfoChanged "Link to this definition")

Issued when some information about a target has changed. This only happens between `targetCreated` and `targetDestroyed`.

target\_info_: [`TargetInfo`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo "nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfo")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/target.html#nodriver.cdp.target.TargetInfoChanged.target_info "Link to this definition")

# WebAuthn - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode  

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

WebAuthn[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#webauthn "Link to this heading")

=======================================================================================================================

This domain allows configuring virtual authenticators to test the WebAuthn API.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#types "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ AuthenticatorId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#AuthenticatorId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorId "Link to this definition")

_class_ AuthenticatorProtocol(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#AuthenticatorProtocol)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorProtocol "Link to this definition")

U2F _\= 'u2f'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorProtocol.U2F "Link to this definition")

CTAP2 _\= 'ctap2'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorProtocol.CTAP2 "Link to this definition")

_class_ Ctap2Version(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#Ctap2Version)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Ctap2Version "Link to this definition")

CTAP2\_0 _\= 'ctap2\_0'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Ctap2Version.CTAP2_0 "Link to this definition")

CTAP2\_1 _\= 'ctap2\_1'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Ctap2Version.CTAP2_1 "Link to this definition")

_class_ AuthenticatorTransport(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#AuthenticatorTransport)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport "Link to this definition")

USB _\= 'usb'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport.USB "Link to this definition")

NFC _\= 'nfc'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport.NFC "Link to this definition")

BLE _\= 'ble'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport.BLE "Link to this definition")

CABLE _\= 'cable'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport.CABLE "Link to this definition")

INTERNAL _\= 'internal'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport.INTERNAL "Link to this definition")

_class_ VirtualAuthenticatorOptions(_protocol_, _transport_, _ctap2\_version\=None_, _has\_resident\_key\=None_, _has\_user\_verification\=None_, _has\_large\_blob\=None_, _has\_cred\_blob\=None_, _has\_min\_pin\_length\=None_, _has\_prf\=None_, _automatic\_presence\_simulation\=None_, _is\_user\_verified\=None_, _default\_backup\_eligibility\=None_, _default\_backup\_state\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#VirtualAuthenticatorOptions)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions "Link to this definition")

protocol_: [`AuthenticatorProtocol`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorProtocol "nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorProtocol")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.protocol "Link to this definition")

transport_: [`AuthenticatorTransport`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport "nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorTransport")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.transport "Link to this definition")

ctap2\_version_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Ctap2Version`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Ctap2Version "nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Ctap2Version")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.ctap2_version "Link to this definition")

Defaults to ctap2\_0. Ignored if `protocol` == u2f.

has\_resident\_key_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_resident_key "Link to this definition")

Defaults to false.

has\_user\_verification_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_user_verification "Link to this definition")

Defaults to false.

has\_large\_blob_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_large_blob "Link to this definition")

If set to true, the authenticator will support the largeBlob extension. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn#largeBlob](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn#largeBlob)
 Defaults to false.

has\_cred\_blob_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_cred_blob "Link to this definition")

If set to true, the authenticator will support the credBlob extension. [https://fidoalliance.org/specs/fido-v2.1-rd-20201208/fido-client-to-authenticator-protocol-v2.1-rd-20201208.html#sctn-credBlob-extension](https://fidoalliance.org/specs/fido-v2.1-rd-20201208/fido-client-to-authenticator-protocol-v2.1-rd-20201208.html#sctn-credBlob-extension)
 Defaults to false.

has\_min\_pin\_length_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_min_pin_length "Link to this definition")

If set to true, the authenticator will support the minPinLength extension. [https://fidoalliance.org/specs/fido-v2.1-ps-20210615/fido-client-to-authenticator-protocol-v2.1-ps-20210615.html#sctn-minpinlength-extension](https://fidoalliance.org/specs/fido-v2.1-ps-20210615/fido-client-to-authenticator-protocol-v2.1-ps-20210615.html#sctn-minpinlength-extension)
 Defaults to false.

has\_prf_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.has_prf "Link to this definition")

If set to true, the authenticator will support the prf extension. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#prf-extension](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#prf-extension)
 Defaults to false.

automatic\_presence\_simulation_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.automatic_presence_simulation "Link to this definition")

If set to true, tests of user presence will succeed immediately. Otherwise, they will not be resolved. Defaults to true.

is\_user\_verified_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.is_user_verified "Link to this definition")

Sets whether User Verification succeeds or fails for an authenticator. Defaults to false.

default\_backup\_eligibility_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.default_backup_eligibility "Link to this definition")

Credentials created by this authenticator will have the backup eligibility (BE) flag set to this value. Defaults to false. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-credential-backup](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-credential-backup)

default\_backup\_state_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.VirtualAuthenticatorOptions.default_backup_state "Link to this definition")

Credentials created by this authenticator will have the backup state (BS) flag set to this value. Defaults to false. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-credential-backup](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-credential-backup)

_class_ Credential(_credential\_id_, _is\_resident\_credential_, _private\_key_, _sign\_count_, _rp\_id\=None_, _user\_handle\=None_, _large\_blob\=None_, _backup\_eligibility\=None_, _backup\_state\=None_, _user\_name\=None_, _user\_display\_name\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#Credential)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential "Link to this definition")

credential\_id_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.credential_id "Link to this definition")

is\_resident\_credential_: [`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.is_resident_credential "Link to this definition")

private\_key_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.private_key "Link to this definition")

The ECDSA P-256 private key in PKCS#8 format. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

sign\_count_: [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.sign_count "Link to this definition")

Signature counter. This is incremented by one for each successful assertion. See [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#signature-counter](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#signature-counter)

rp\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.rp_id "Link to this definition")

Relying Party ID the credential is scoped to. Must be set when adding a credential.

user\_handle_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.user_handle "Link to this definition")

An opaque byte sequence with a maximum size of 64 bytes mapping the credential to a specific user. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

large\_blob_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.large_blob "Link to this definition")

The large blob associated with the credential. See [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-large-blob-extension](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#sctn-large-blob-extension)
 (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

backup\_eligibility_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.backup_eligibility "Link to this definition")

Assertions returned by this credential will have the backup eligibility (BE) flag set to this value. Defaults to the authenticator’s defaultBackupEligibility value.

backup\_state_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.backup_state "Link to this definition")

Assertions returned by this credential will have the backup state (BS) flag set to this value. Defaults to the authenticator’s defaultBackupState value.

user\_name_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.user_name "Link to this definition")

The credential’s user.name property. Equivalent to empty if not set. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#dom-publickeycredentialentity-name](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#dom-publickeycredentialentity-name)

user\_display\_name_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.Credential.user_display_name "Link to this definition")

The credential’s user.displayName property. Equivalent to empty if not set. [https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#dom-publickeycredentialuserentity-displayname](https://w3c.github.io/webauthn/#dom-publickeycredentialuserentity-displayname)

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#commands "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

enable(_enable\_ui\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#enable)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.enable "Link to this definition")

Enable the WebAuthn domain and start intercepting credential storage and retrieval with a virtual authenticator.

Parameters:

**enable\_ui** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to enable the WebAuthn user interface. Enabling the UI is recommended for debugging and demo purposes, as it is closer to the real experience. Disabling the UI is recommended for automated testing. Supported at the embedder’s discretion if UI is available. Defaults to false.

set\_response\_override\_bits(_authenticator\_id_, _is\_bogus\_signature\=None_, _is\_bad\_uv\=None_, _is\_bad\_up\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#set_response_override_bits)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.set_response_override_bits "Link to this definition")

Resets parameters isBogusSignature, isBadUV, isBadUP to false if they are not present.

Parameters:

*   **authenticator\_id** ([`AuthenticatorId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorId "nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorId")
    ) –
    
*   **is\_bogus\_signature** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ If isBogusSignature is set, overrides the signature in the authenticator response to be zero. Defaults to false.
    
*   **is\_bad\_uv** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ If isBadUV is set, overrides the UV bit in the flags in the authenticator response to be zero. Defaults to false.
    
*   **is\_bad\_up** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ If isBadUP is set, overrides the UP bit in the flags in the authenticator response to be zero. Defaults to false.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")

, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\

\]

set\_user\_verified(_authenticator\_id_, _is\_user\_verified_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#set_user_verified)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.set_user_verified "Link to this definition")

Sets whether User Verification succeeds or fails for an authenticator. The default is true.

Parameters:

*   **authenticator\_id** ([`AuthenticatorId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorId "nodriver.cdp.web_authn.AuthenticatorId")
    ) –
    
*   **is\_user\_verified** ([`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) –

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#events "Link to this heading")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ CredentialAdded(_authenticator\_id_, _credential_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#CredentialAdded)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.CredentialAdded "Link to this definition")

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.CredentialDeleted.authenticator_id "Link to this definition")

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/web_authn.html#nodriver.cdp.web_authn.CredentialUpdated.authenticator_id "Link to this definition")

Preload[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#preload "Link to this heading")

===================================================================================================================

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#types "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ RuleSetId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#RuleSetId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetId "Link to this definition")

Unique id

_class_ RuleSet(_id\__, _loader\_id_, _source\_text_, _backend\_node\_id\=None_, _url\=None_, _request\_id\=None_, _error\_type\=None_, _error\_message\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#RuleSet)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet "Link to this definition")

Corresponds to SpeculationRuleSet

id\__: [`RuleSetId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetId "nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.id_ "Link to this definition")

loader\_id_: [`LoaderId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.LoaderId "nodriver.cdp.network.LoaderId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.loader_id "Link to this definition")

Identifies a document which the rule set is associated with.

source\_text_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.source_text "Link to this definition")

Source text of JSON representing the rule set. If it comes from `<script>` tag, it is the textContent of the node. Note that it is a JSON for valid case.

See also: - [https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html](https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html)
 - [https://github.com/WICG/nav-speculation/blob/main/triggers.md](https://github.com/WICG/nav-speculation/blob/main/triggers.md)

backend\_node\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.backend_node_id "Link to this definition")

A speculation rule set is either added through an inline `<script>` tag or through an external resource via the ‘Speculation-Rules’ HTTP header. For the first case, we include the BackendNodeId of the relevant `<script>` tag. For the second case, we include the external URL where the rule set was loaded from, and also RequestId if Network domain is enabled.

See also: - [https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html#speculation-rules-script](https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html#speculation-rules-script)
 - [https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html#speculation-rules-header](https://wicg.github.io/nav-speculation/speculation-rules.html#speculation-rules-header)

url_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.url "Link to this definition")

request\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`RequestId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId "nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.request_id "Link to this definition")

error\_type_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`RuleSetErrorType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType "nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.error_type "Link to this definition")

Error information `errorMessage` is null iff `errorType` is null.

error\_message_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSet.error_message "Link to this definition")

Replace this property with structured error.

Type:

_class_ RuleSetErrorType(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#RuleSetErrorType)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType "Link to this definition")

SOURCE\_IS\_NOT\_JSON\_OBJECT _\= 'SourceIsNotJsonObject'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType.SOURCE_IS_NOT_JSON_OBJECT "Link to this definition")

INVALID\_RULES\_SKIPPED _\= 'InvalidRulesSkipped'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType.INVALID_RULES_SKIPPED "Link to this definition")

INVALID\_RULESET\_LEVEL\_TAG _\= 'InvalidRulesetLevelTag'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetErrorType.INVALID_RULESET_LEVEL_TAG "Link to this definition")

_class_ SpeculationAction(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#SpeculationAction)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationAction "Link to this definition")

The type of preloading attempted. It corresponds to mojom::SpeculationAction (although PrefetchWithSubresources is omitted as it isn’t being used by clients).

PREFETCH _\= 'Prefetch'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationAction.PREFETCH "Link to this definition")

PRERENDER _\= 'Prerender'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationAction.PRERENDER "Link to this definition")

_class_ SpeculationTargetHint(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#SpeculationTargetHint)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationTargetHint "Link to this definition")

Corresponds to mojom::SpeculationTargetHint. See https://github.com/WICG/nav-speculation/blob/main/triggers.md#window-name-targeting-hints

BLANK _\= 'Blank'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationTargetHint.BLANK "Link to this definition")

SELF _\= 'Self'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationTargetHint.SELF "Link to this definition")

_class_ PreloadingAttemptKey(_loader\_id_, _action_, _url_, _target\_hint\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#PreloadingAttemptKey)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey "Link to this definition")

A key that identifies a preloading attempt.

The url used is the url specified by the trigger (i.e. the initial URL), and not the final url that is navigated to. For example, prerendering allows same-origin main frame navigations during the attempt, but the attempt is still keyed with the initial URL.

loader\_id_: [`LoaderId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.LoaderId "nodriver.cdp.network.LoaderId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey.loader_id "Link to this definition")

action_: [`SpeculationAction`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationAction "nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationAction")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey.action "Link to this definition")

url_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey.url "Link to this definition")

target\_hint_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`SpeculationTargetHint`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationTargetHint "nodriver.cdp.preload.SpeculationTargetHint")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey.target_hint "Link to this definition")

_class_ PreloadingAttemptSource(_key_, _rule\_set\_ids_, _node\_ids_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#PreloadingAttemptSource)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptSource "Link to this definition")

Lists sources for a preloading attempt, specifically the ids of rule sets that had a speculation rule that triggered the attempt, and the BackendNodeIds of <a href> or <area href> elements that triggered the attempt (in the case of attempts triggered by a document rule). It is possible for multiple rule sets and links to trigger a single attempt.

key_: [`PreloadingAttemptKey`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey "nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptKey")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptSource.key "Link to this definition")

rule\_set\_ids_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`RuleSetId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetId "nodriver.cdp.preload.RuleSetId")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptSource.rule_set_ids "Link to this definition")

node\_ids_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadingAttemptSource.node_ids "Link to this definition")

_class_ PreloadPipelineId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#PreloadPipelineId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PreloadPipelineId "Link to this definition")

Chrome manages different types of preloads together using a concept of preloading pipeline. For example, if a site uses a SpeculationRules for prerender, Chrome first starts a prefetch and then upgrades it to prerender.

CDP events for them are emitted separately but they share `PreloadPipelineId`.

_class_ PrerenderFinalStatus(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#PrerenderFinalStatus)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus "Link to this definition")

List of FinalStatus reasons for Prerender2.

ACTIVATED _\= 'Activated'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.ACTIVATED "Link to this definition")

DESTROYED _\= 'Destroyed'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.DESTROYED "Link to this definition")

LOW\_END\_DEVICE _\= 'LowEndDevice'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.LOW_END_DEVICE "Link to this definition")

INVALID\_SCHEME\_REDIRECT _\= 'InvalidSchemeRedirect'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.INVALID_SCHEME_REDIRECT "Link to this definition")

INVALID\_SCHEME\_NAVIGATION _\= 'InvalidSchemeNavigation'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.INVALID_SCHEME_NAVIGATION "Link to this definition")

NAVIGATION\_REQUEST\_BLOCKED\_BY\_CSP _\= 'NavigationRequestBlockedByCsp'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.NAVIGATION_REQUEST_BLOCKED_BY_CSP "Link to this definition")

MOJO\_BINDER\_POLICY _\= 'MojoBinderPolicy'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.MOJO_BINDER_POLICY "Link to this definition")

RENDERER\_PROCESS\_CRASHED _\= 'RendererProcessCrashed'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.RENDERER_PROCESS_CRASHED "Link to this definition")

RENDERER\_PROCESS\_KILLED _\= 'RendererProcessKilled'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#nodriver.cdp.preload.PrerenderFinalStatus.RENDERER_PROCESS_KILLED "Link to this definition")

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#commands "Link to this heading")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/preload.html#events "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

# Emulation - nodriver documentation

Emulation[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#emulation "Link to this heading")

=========================================================================================================================

This domain emulates different environments for the page.

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#types "Link to this heading")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ SafeAreaInsets(_top\=None_, _top\_max\=None_, _left\=None_, _left\_max\=None_, _bottom\=None_, _bottom\_max\=None_, _right\=None_, _right\_max\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#SafeAreaInsets)

\[[`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.SafeAreaInsets.left_max "Link to this definition")

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.ScreenOrientation.angle "Link to this definition")

Orientation angle.

_class_ DisplayFeature(_orientation_, _offset_, _mask\_length_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#DisplayFeature)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.DisplayFeature "Link to this definition")

orientation_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.DisplayFeature.orientation "Link to this definition")

Orientation of a display feature in relation to screen

offset_: [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.DisplayFeature.offset "Link to this definition")

The offset from the screen origin in either the x (for vertical orientation) or y (for horizontal orientation) direction.

mask\_length_: [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.DisplayFeature.mask_length "Link to this definition")

A display feature may mask content such that it is not physically displayed - this length along with the offset describes this area. A display feature that only splits content will have a 0 mask\_length.

_class_ VirtualTimePolicy(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#VirtualTimePolicy)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.VirtualTimePolicy "Link to this definition")

advance: If the scheduler runs out of immediate work, the virtual time base may fast forward to allow the next delayed task (if any) to run; pause: The virtual time base may not advance; pauseIfNetworkFetchesPending: The virtual time base may not advance if there are any pending resource fetches.

ADVANCE _\= 'advance'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.VirtualTimePolicy.ADVANCE "Link to this definition")

PAUSE _\= 'pause'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.VirtualTimePolicy.PAUSE "Link to this definition")

PAUSE\_IF\_NETWORK\_FETCHES\_PENDING _\= 'pauseIfNetworkFetchesPending'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.VirtualTimePolicy.PAUSE_IF_NETWORK_FETCHES_PENDING "Link to this definition")

MAGNETOMETER _\= 'magnetometer'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#nodriver.cdp.emulation.SensorType.MAGNETOMETER "Link to this definition")

_class_ ScreenId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/emulation.html#ScreenId)
