get\_animated\_styles\_for\_node(_node\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#get_animated_styles_for_node)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.get_animated_styles_for_node "Link to this definition")

Returns the styles coming from animations & transitions including the animation & transition styles coming from inheritance chain.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

**node\_id** ([`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")
) –

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Tuple`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Tuple "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`CSSAnimationStyle`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSAnimationStyle "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSAnimationStyle")\
\]\], [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`CSSStyle`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSStyle "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSStyle")\
\], [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`InheritedAnimatedStyleEntry`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.InheritedAnimatedStyleEntry "nodriver.cdp.css.InheritedAnimatedStyleEntry")\
\]\]\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **animationStyles** - _(Optional)_ Styles coming from animations.
    
1.  **transitionsStyle** - _(Optional)_ Style coming from transitions.
    
2.  **inherited** - _(Optional)_ Inherited style entries for animationsStyle and transitionsStyle from the inheritance chain of the element.
    

get\_background\_colors(_node\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#get_background_colors)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.get_background_colors "Link to this definition")

Parameters:

**node\_id** ([`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")
) – Id of the node to get background colors for.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Tuple`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Tuple "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]\], [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **backgroundColors** - _(Optional)_ The range of background colors behind this element, if it contains any visible text. If no visible text is present, this will be undefined. In the case of a flat background color, this will consist of simply that color. In the case of a gradient, this will consist of each of the color stops. For anything more complicated, this will be an empty array. Images will be ignored (as if the image had failed to load).
    
1.  **computedFontSize** - _(Optional)_ The computed font size for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. ‘12px’).
    
2.  **computedFontWeight** - _(Optional)_ The computed font weight for this node, as a CSS computed value string (e.g. ‘normal’ or ‘100’).
    

get\_computed\_style\_for\_node(_node\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#get_computed_style_for_node)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.get_computed_style_for_node "Link to this definition")

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\

\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\

\], [`ComputedStyleExtraFields`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.ComputedStyleExtraFields "nodriver.cdp.css.ComputedStyleExtraFields")\
\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **computedStyle** - Computed style for the specified DOM node.
    
1.  **extraFields** - A list of non-standard “extra fields” which blink stores alongside each computed style.

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.get_inline_styles_for_node "Link to this definition")

\]\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **inlineStyle** - _(Optional)_ Inline style for the specified DOM node.
    
1.  **attributesStyle** - _(Optional)_ Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from “width=20 height=100%”).
    

get\_layers\_for\_node(_node\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#get_layers_for_node)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.get_layers_for_node "Link to this definition")

Returns all layers parsed by the rendering engine for the tree scope of a node. Given a DOM element identified by nodeId, getLayersForNode returns the root layer for the nearest ancestor document or shadow root. The layer root contains the full layer tree for the tree scope and their ordering.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

**node\_id** ([`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")
) –

Return type:

\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`CSSLayerData`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSLayerData "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSLayerData")\
\]

\], [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`CSSFunctionRule`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSFunctionRule "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSFunctionRule")\
\]\]\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **inlineStyle** - _(Optional)_ Inline style for the specified DOM node.
    
1.  **attributesStyle** - _(Optional)_ Attribute-defined element style (e.g. resulting from “width=20 height=100%”).
    
2.  **matchedCSSRules** - _(Optional)_ CSS rules matching this node, from all applicable stylesheets.
    
3.  **pseudoElements** - _(Optional)_ Pseudo style matches for this node.
    
4.  **inherited** - _(Optional)_ A chain of inherited styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).
    
5.  **inheritedPseudoElements** - _(Optional)_ A chain of inherited pseudo element styles (from the immediate node parent up to the DOM tree root).
    
6.  **cssKeyframesRules** - _(Optional)_ A list of CSS keyframed animations matching this node.
    
7.  **cssPositionTryRules** - _(Optional)_ A list of CSS @position-try rules matching this node, based on the position-try-fallbacks property.
    
8.  **activePositionFallbackIndex** - _(Optional)_ Index of the active fallback in the applied position-try-fallback property, will not be set if there is no active position-try fallback.
    
9.  **cssPropertyRules** - _(Optional)_ A list of CSS at-property rules matching this node.
    
10.  **cssPropertyRegistrations** - _(Optional)_ A list of CSS property registrations matching this node.
    
11.  **cssFontPaletteValuesRule** - _(Optional)_ A font-palette-values rule matching this node.
    
12.  **parentLayoutNodeId** - _(Optional)_ Id of the first parent element that does not have display: contents.
    
13.  **cssFunctionRules** - _(Optional)_ A list of CSS at-function rules referenced by styles of this node.

resolve\_values(_values_, _node\_id_, _property\_name\=None_, _pseudo\_type\=None_, _pseudo\_identifier\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#resolve_values)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.resolve_values "Link to this definition")

Resolve the specified values in the context of the provided element. For example, a value of ‘1em’ is evaluated according to the computed ‘font-size’ of the element and a value ‘calc(1px + 2px)’ will be resolved to ‘3px’. If the `propertyName` was specified the `values` are resolved as if they were property’s declaration. If a value cannot be parsed according to the provided property syntax, the value is parsed using combined syntax as if null `propertyName` was provided. If the value cannot be resolved even then, return the provided value without any changes.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

*   **values** ([`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – Cascade-dependent keywords (revert/revert-layer) do not work.
    
*   **node\_id** ([`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")
    ) – Id of the node in whose context the expression is evaluated
    
*   **property\_name** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Only longhands and custom property names are accepted.
    
*   **pseudo\_type** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`PseudoType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.PseudoType "nodriver.cdp.dom.PseudoType")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Pseudo element type, only works for pseudo elements that generate elements in the tree, such as ::before and ::after.
    
*   **pseudo\_identifier** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Pseudo element custom ident.
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]\]

Returns:

set\_style\_texts(_edits_, _node\_for\_property\_syntax\_validation\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#set_style_texts)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.set_style_texts "Link to this definition")

Applies specified style edits one after another in the given order.

Parameters:

*   **edits** ([`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`StyleDeclarationEdit`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleDeclarationEdit "nodriver.cdp.css.StyleDeclarationEdit")\
    \]) –
    
*   **node\_for\_property\_syntax\_validation** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")\
    \]) – **(EXPERIMENTAL)** _(Optional)_ NodeId for the DOM node in whose context custom property declarations for registered properties should be validated. If omitted, declarations in the new rule text can only be validated statically, which may produce incorrect results if the declaration contains a var() for example.
    

Return type:

\]\]

track\_computed\_style\_updates(_properties\_to\_track_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#track_computed_style_updates)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.track_computed_style_updates "Link to this definition")

Starts tracking the given computed styles for updates. The specified array of properties replaces the one previously specified. Pass empty array to disable tracking. Use takeComputedStyleUpdates to retrieve the list of nodes that had properties modified. The changes to computed style properties are only tracked for nodes pushed to the front-end by the DOM agent. If no changes to the tracked properties occur after the node has been pushed to the front-end, no updates will be issued for the node.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

**properties\_to\_track** ([`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`CSSComputedStyleProperty`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSComputedStyleProperty "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSComputedStyleProperty")\
\]) –

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

track\_computed\_style\_updates\_for\_node(_node\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#track_computed_style_updates_for_node)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.track_computed_style_updates_for_node "Link to this definition")

Starts tracking the given node for the computed style updates and whenever the computed style is updated for node, it queues a `computedStyleUpdated` event with throttling. There can only be 1 node tracked for computed style updates so passing a new node id removes tracking from the previous node. Pass `undefined` to disable tracking.

**EXPERIMENTAL**

Parameters:

**node\_id** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`NodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.NodeId")\
\]) – _(Optional)_

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#events "Link to this heading")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ FontsUpdated(_font_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#FontsUpdated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.FontsUpdated "Link to this definition")

Fires whenever a web font is updated. A non-empty font parameter indicates a successfully loaded web font.

font_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`FontFace`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.FontFace "nodriver.cdp.css.FontFace")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.FontsUpdated.font "Link to this definition")

The web font that has loaded.

_class_ MediaQueryResultChanged[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#MediaQueryResultChanged)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.MediaQueryResultChanged "Link to this definition")

Fires whenever a MediaQuery result changes (for example, after a browser window has been resized.) The current implementation considers only viewport-dependent media features.

_class_ StyleSheetAdded(_header_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#StyleSheetAdded)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetAdded "Link to this definition")

Fired whenever an active document stylesheet is added.

header_: [`CSSStyleSheetHeader`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.CSSStyleSheetHeader "nodriver.cdp.css.CSSStyleSheetHeader")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetAdded.header "Link to this definition")

Added stylesheet metainfo.

_class_ StyleSheetChanged(_style\_sheet\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#StyleSheetChanged)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetChanged "Link to this definition")

Fired whenever a stylesheet is changed as a result of the client operation.

style\_sheet\_id_: [`StyleSheetId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetId "nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetChanged.style_sheet_id "Link to this definition")

_class_ StyleSheetRemoved(_style\_sheet\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#StyleSheetRemoved)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetRemoved "Link to this definition")

Fired whenever an active document stylesheet is removed.

style\_sheet\_id_: [`StyleSheetId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetId "nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.StyleSheetRemoved.style_sheet_id "Link to this definition")

Identifier of the removed stylesheet.

_class_ ComputedStyleUpdated(_node\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/css.html#ComputedStyleUpdated)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.ComputedStyleUpdated "Link to this definition")

**EXPERIMENTAL**

_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/css.html#nodriver.cdp.css.ComputedStyleUpdated.node_id "Link to this definition")

# Audits - nodriver documentation

Contents Menu Expand Light mode Dark mode Auto light/dark mode  

[Back to top](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#)

Toggle Light / Dark / Auto color theme

Toggle table of contents sidebar

Audits[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#audits "Link to this heading")

================================================================================================================

Audits domain allows investigation of page violations and possible improvements.

_This CDP domain is experimental._

*   [Types](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#types)
    
*   [Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#commands)
    
*   [Events](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#events)
    

Types[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#types "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP types yourself. Instead, the API creates objects for you as return values from commands, and then you can use those objects as arguments to other commands.

_class_ AffectedCookie(_name_, _path_, _domain_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#AffectedCookie)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie "Link to this definition")

Information about a cookie that is affected by an inspector issue.

name_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie.name "Link to this definition")

The following three properties uniquely identify a cookie

path_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie.path "Link to this definition")

domain_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie.domain "Link to this definition")

_class_ AffectedRequest(_url_, _request\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#AffectedRequest)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest "Link to this definition")

Information about a request that is affected by an inspector issue.

url_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest.url "Link to this definition")

request\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`RequestId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId "nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest.request_id "Link to this definition")

The unique request id.

_class_ AffectedFrame(_frame\_id_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#AffectedFrame)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame "Link to this definition")

Information about the frame affected by an inspector issue.

frame\_id_: [`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame.frame_id "Link to this definition")

_class_ CookieExclusionReason(_value_, _names\=None_, _\*_, _module\=None_, _qualname\=None_, _type\=None_, _start\=1_, _boundary\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#CookieExclusionReason)

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueInsight "Link to this definition")

Information about the suggested solution to a cookie issue.

type\__: [`InsightType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InsightType "nodriver.cdp.audits.InsightType")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueInsight.type_ "Link to this definition")

table\_entry\_url_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueInsight.table_entry_url "Link to this definition")

Link to table entry in third-party cookie migration readiness list.

_class_ CookieIssueDetails(_cookie\_warning\_reasons_, _cookie\_exclusion\_reasons_, _operation_, _cookie\=None_, _raw\_cookie\_line\=None_, _site\_for\_cookies\=None_, _cookie\_url\=None_, _request\=None_, _insight\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#CookieIssueDetails)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

This information is currently necessary, as the front-end has a difficult time finding a specific cookie. With this, we can convey specific error information without the cookie.

cookie\_warning\_reasons_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`CookieWarningReason`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieWarningReason "nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieWarningReason")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.cookie_warning_reasons "Link to this definition")

cookie\_exclusion\_reasons_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`CookieExclusionReason`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieExclusionReason "nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieExclusionReason")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.cookie_exclusion_reasons "Link to this definition")

operation_: [`CookieOperation`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieOperation "nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieOperation")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.operation "Link to this definition")

Optionally identifies the site-for-cookies and the cookie url, which may be used by the front-end as additional context.

cookie_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedCookie`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedCookie")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.cookie "Link to this definition")

If AffectedCookie is not set then rawCookieLine contains the raw Set-Cookie header string. This hints at a problem where the cookie line is syntactically or semantically malformed in a way that no valid cookie could be created.

raw\_cookie\_line_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.raw_cookie_line "Link to this definition")

site\_for\_cookies_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.site_for_cookies "Link to this definition")

cookie\_url_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.cookie_url "Link to this definition")

request_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedRequest`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.request "Link to this definition")

insight_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`CookieIssueInsight`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueInsight "nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueInsight")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieIssueDetails.insight "Link to this definition")

The recommended solution to the issue.

_class_ MixedContentIssueDetails(_resolution\_status_, _insecure\_url_, _main\_resource\_url_, _resource\_type\=None_, _request\=None_, _frame\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#MixedContentIssueDetails)

resolution\_status_: [`MixedContentResolutionStatus`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentResolutionStatus "nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentResolutionStatus")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.resolution_status "Link to this definition")

The way the mixed content issue is being resolved.

insecure\_url_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.insecure_url "Link to this definition")

The unsafe http url causing the mixed content issue.

main\_resource\_url_: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.main_resource_url "Link to this definition")

The url responsible for the call to an unsafe url.

resource\_type_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`MixedContentResourceType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentResourceType "nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentResourceType")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.resource_type "Link to this definition")

The type of resource causing the mixed content issue (css, js, iframe, form,…). Marked as optional because it is mapped to from blink::mojom::RequestContextType, which will be replaced by network::mojom::RequestDestination

request_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedRequest`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.request "Link to this definition")

The mixed content request. Does not always exist (e.g. for unsafe form submission urls).

frame_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedFrame`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.MixedContentIssueDetails.frame "Link to this definition")

Optional because not every mixed content issue is necessarily linked to a frame.

COOP\_SANDBOXED\_I\_FRAME\_CANNOT\_NAVIGATE\_TO\_COOP\_PAGE _\= 'CoopSandboxedIFrameCannotNavigateToCoopPage'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BlockedByResponseReason.COOP_SANDBOXED_I_FRAME_CANNOT_NAVIGATE_TO_COOP_PAGE "Link to this definition")

CORP\_NOT\_SAME\_ORIGIN _\= 'CorpNotSameOrigin'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BlockedByResponseReason.CORP_NOT_SAME_ORIGIN "Link to this definition")

CORP\_NOT\_SAME\_ORIGIN\_AFTER\_DEFAULTED\_TO\_SAME\_ORIGIN\_BY\_DIP _\= 'CorpNotSameOriginAfterDefaultedToSameOriginByDip'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BlockedByResponseReason.CORP_NOT_SAME_ORIGIN_AFTER_DEFAULTED_TO_SAME_ORIGIN_BY_DIP "Link to this definition")

CORP\_NOT\_SAME\_ORIGIN\_AFTER\_DEFAULTED\_TO\_SAME\_ORIGIN\_BY\_COEP\_AND\_DIP _\= 'CorpNotSameOriginAfterDefaultedToSameOriginByCoepAndDip'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BlockedByResponseReason.CORP_NOT_SAME_ORIGIN_AFTER_DEFAULTED_TO_SAME_ORIGIN_BY_COEP_AND_DIP "Link to this definition")

SRI\_MESSAGE\_SIGNATURE\_MISMATCH _\= 'SRIMessageSignatureMismatch'_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BlockedByResponseReason.SRI_MESSAGE_SIGNATURE_MISMATCH "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AttributionReportingIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

Details for issues around “Attribution Reporting API” usage. Explainer: [https://github.com/WICG/attribution-reporting-api](https://github.com/WICG/attribution-reporting-api)

violation\_type_: [`AttributionReportingIssueType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AttributionReportingIssueType "nodriver.cdp.audits.AttributionReportingIssueType")

request_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedRequest`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedRequest")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AttributionReportingIssueDetails.request "Link to this definition")

\[[`BackendNodeId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/dom.html#nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId "nodriver.cdp.dom.BackendNodeId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AttributionReportingIssueDetails.violating_node_id "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.QuirksModeIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

Details for issues about documents in Quirks Mode or Limited Quirks Mode that affects page layouting.

is\_limited\_quirks\_mode_: [`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.QuirksModeIssueDetails.is_limited_quirks_mode "Link to this definition")

If false, it means the document’s mode is “quirks” instead of “limited-quirks”.

Depending on the concrete errorType, different properties are set.

error\_type_: [`GenericIssueErrorType`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.GenericIssueErrorType "nodriver.cdp.audits.GenericIssueErrorType")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.GenericIssueDetails.error_type "Link to this definition")

Issues with the same errorType are aggregated in the frontend.

\[[`FrameId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/page.html#nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId "nodriver.cdp.page.FrameId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.GenericIssueDetails.frame_id "Link to this definition")

\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.GenericIssueDetails.violating_node_attribute "Link to this definition")

_class_ DeprecationIssueDetails(_source\_code\_location_, _type\__, _affected\_frame\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#DeprecationIssueDetails)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.DeprecationIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

This issue tracks information needed to print a deprecation message. [https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third\_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/third\_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/README.md](https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/third_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/README.md)

type\__: [`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.DeprecationIssueDetails.type_ "Link to this definition")

One of the deprecation names from third\_party/blink/renderer/core/frame/deprecation/deprecation.json5

affected\_frame_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`AffectedFrame`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame "nodriver.cdp.audits.AffectedFrame")\

_class_ BounceTrackingIssueDetails(_tracking\_sites_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#BounceTrackingIssueDetails)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BounceTrackingIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

This issue warns about sites in the redirect chain of a finished navigation that may be flagged as trackers and have their state cleared if they don’t receive a user interaction. Note that in this context ‘site’ means eTLD+1. For example, if the URL `https://example.test:80/bounce` was in the redirect chain, the site reported would be `example.test`.

tracking\_sites_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.BounceTrackingIssueDetails.tracking_sites "Link to this definition")

_class_ CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails(_allowed\_sites_, _opt\_out\_percentage_, _is\_opt\_out\_top\_level_, _operation_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails "Link to this definition")

This issue warns about third-party sites that are accessing cookies on the current page, and have been permitted due to having a global metadata grant. Note that in this context ‘site’ means eTLD+1. For example, if the URL `https://example.test:80/web_page` was accessing cookies, the site reported would be `example.test`.

allowed\_sites_: [`List`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.List "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails.allowed_sites "Link to this definition")

opt\_out\_percentage_: [`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails.opt_out_percentage "Link to this definition")

is\_opt\_out\_top\_level_: [`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails.is_opt_out_top_level "Link to this definition")

operation_: [`CookieOperation`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieOperation "nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieOperation")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.CookieDeprecationMetadataIssueDetails.operation "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.FederatedAuthRequestIssueReason "Link to this definition")

_class_ IssueId[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#IssueId)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.IssueId "Link to this definition")

A unique id for a DevTools inspector issue. Allows other entities (e.g. exceptions, CDP message, console messages, etc.) to reference an issue.

_class_ InspectorIssue(_code_, _details_, _issue\_id\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#InspectorIssue)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue "Link to this definition")

An inspector issue reported from the back-end.

code_: [`InspectorIssueCode`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssueCode "nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssueCode")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue.code "Link to this definition")

details_: [`InspectorIssueDetails`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssueDetails "nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssueDetails")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue.details "Link to this definition")

issue\_id_: [`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`IssueId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.IssueId "nodriver.cdp.audits.IssueId")\
\]_ _\= None_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue.issue_id "Link to this definition")

A unique id for this issue. May be omitted if no other entity (e.g. exception, CDP message, etc.) is referencing this issue.

Commands[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#commands "Link to this heading")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Each command is a generator function. The return type `Generator[x, y, z]` indicates that the generator _yields_ arguments of type `x`, it must be resumed with an argument of type `y`, and it returns type `z`. In this library, types `x` and `y` are the same for all commands, and `z` is the return type you should pay attention to. For more information, see [Getting Started: Commands](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/readme.html#getting-started-commands)
.

check\_contrast(_report\_aaa\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#check_contrast)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.check_contrast "Link to this definition")

Runs the contrast check for the target page. Found issues are reported using Audits.issueAdded event.

Parameters:

**report\_aaa** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to report WCAG AAA level issues. Default is false.

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\

, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`None`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/constants.html#None "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.check_forms_issues "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.disable "Link to this definition")

[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.enable "Link to this definition")

Enables issues domain, sends the issues collected so far to the client by means of the `issueAdded` event.

, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\

get\_encoded\_response(_request\_id_, _encoding_, _quality\=None_, _size\_only\=None_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#get_encoded_response)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.get_encoded_response "Link to this definition")

Returns the response body and size if it were re-encoded with the specified settings. Only applies to images.

Parameters:

*   **request\_id** ([`RequestId`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/network.html#nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId "nodriver.cdp.network.RequestId")
    ) – Identifier of the network request to get content for.
    
*   **encoding** ([`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")
    ) – The encoding to use.
    
*   **quality** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`float`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#float "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ The quality of the encoding (0-1). (defaults to 1)
    
*   **size\_only** ([`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")
    \[[`bool`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#bool "(in Python v3.13)")\
    \]) – _(Optional)_ Whether to only return the size information (defaults to false).
    

Return type:

[`Generator`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Generator "(in Python v3.13)")
\[[`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Dict`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Dict "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`Any`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Any "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`Tuple`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Tuple "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`Optional`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/typing.html#typing.Optional "(in Python v3.13)")\
\[[`str`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/stdtypes.html#str "(in Python v3.13)")\
\], [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
, [`int`](https://docs.python.org/3/library/functions.html#int "(in Python v3.13)")\
\]\]

Returns:

A tuple with the following items:

0.  **body** - _(Optional)_ The encoded body as a base64 string. Omitted if sizeOnly is true. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)
    
1.  **originalSize** - Size before re-encoding.
    
2.  **encodedSize** - Size after re-encoding.
    

Events[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#events "Link to this heading")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generally, you do not need to instantiate CDP events yourself. Instead, the API creates events for you and then you use the event’s attributes.

_class_ IssueAdded(_issue_)[\[source\]](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/_modules/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#IssueAdded)
[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.IssueAdded "Link to this definition")

issue_: [`InspectorIssue`](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue "nodriver.cdp.audits.InspectorIssue")
_[#](https://ultrafunkamsterdam.github.io/nodriver/nodriver/cdp/audits.html#nodriver.cdp.audits.IssueAdded.issue "Link to this definition")
